title: Bilo Bilo with Filipino Ginataang Sauce
description: A Filipino dessert made with glutinous rice balls in a creamy coconut milk sauce. This recipe is a twist on the traditional Filipino dessert by adding a hint of lemon.
instructions: Combine the glutinous rice flour and bilo in a bowl. Gradually add the water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes pliable.
Divide the dough into small balls and set aside.
In a saucepan, combine the ginataang sauce, coconut milk, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil.
Add the lemon juice and stir well.
When the mixture starts to boil, add the glutinous rice balls and cook for 5-7 minutes or until they float to the surface.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
